name: Stale Permissions Review
description: Scheduled playbook that reviews and identifies stale permissions across the organization. Scans for users with permissions they haven't exercised in 90+ days, uses AI to recommend removals based on role and usage patterns, creates ITSM tickets for permission cleanup, and generates a compliance summary for access governance.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Query permission usage and group membership activity

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create cleanup tickets for stale permission removal

data.title: Scheduled Permissions Review
data.summary: Runs on a monthly schedule to scan for stale permissions

config.description: Monthly 1st of month 8 AM stale permissions review

data.title: Scan Stale Permissions
data.summary: Query identity provider for permissions unused in 90+ days

data.title: AI Permission Removal Recommendations
data.summary: Analyze stale permissions and recommend removals based on role context

data.title: Stale Permissions Found?
data.summary: Branch if AI identified permissions recommended for removal

data.title: Create Cleanup Tickets
data.summary: Create Jira tickets for each stale permission removal recommendation

config.title: Stale Permissions Cleanup — {{$.nodes.sp-3.result.recommendations_count}} Recommendations
config.description: Monthly stale permissions review identified {{$.nodes.sp-3.result.recommendations_count}} permissions unused for 90+ days. AI-recommended removals attached. Please review and execute permission removals per least-privilege policy.

data.title: Generate Compliance Summary
data.summary: AI-generated compliance summary of the permissions review cycle

data.title: Send Compliance Report
data.summary: Email the permissions review summary to IT governance and compliance teams

data.title: Log Clean Review
data.summary: Log that no stale permissions were found this cycle

config.note: Monthly stale permissions review completed. No stale permissions identified. All permissions within active usage thresholds.
